history.content: Hey Claw - every day at 3:48pm - Can you send me a message giving me a summary of news events that happened today?

I’ll set up a daily 3:48pm job that gathers the day’s major news and sends you a concise summary. I may ask a quick follow-up about your time zone and preferred type of news so it matches what you want.

I’ll set up a daily 3:48pm job that gathers the day’s major news and sends you a concise summary. I may ask a quick follow-up about your time zone and preferred type of news so it matches what you want.
